TARGET EXPRESSION: sad forlorn expression, inner eyebrows raised, softened tired eyes, mouth corners clearly downturned, no smile, the target expression is mandatory and must be obvious at first glance, do not keep the uploaded reference expression unless the target is neutral, the uploaded front portrait is only an identity, face-shape, hairstyle, and lighting reference, same character as the uploaded front reference portrait, change the facial expression clearly while preserving identity, fixed nine-expression sheet order: neutral expression, smile, angry, surprised, sad, laughing, thinking expression, peaceful, skeptical expression, clearly change eyebrow angle, eyelid openness, gaze focus, cheek tension, mouth corners, lips and jaw tension for the target emotion, each expression cell must be visibly different from the other eight expressions, exact straight-on front close-up head portrait only, face parallel to camera, head level, no side face, no three-quarter face, same face shape, same jawline, same nose shape, same base eye shape, same base lip shape, preserve identity while allowing eyebrows, eyelids and mouth expression to change, same hairstyle, same hairline, same bangs, same hair volume, same hair color, if facial hair exists, keep exact same beard, mustache, stubble shape, length, density, placement, and color across all expression cells, same lighting, same plain light gray background, same crop, same finished full-color portrait, adult male only, masculine facial structure, masculine jawline, stronger brow ridge, male hairline, same beard and facial hair if present, no woman, no girl, no feminine face, no feminine makeup, no long feminine eyelashes, character name: 赵巡令, fixed basic stats: 45岁，男性，体态威严稳重，面部轮廓深邃硬朗，眼神锐利，蓄有整洁的短须，身着大夏朝深色高级官服, fixed appearance: cinematic live action, photorealistic, film quality, natural skin texture, not anime, not cartoon, not cel shaded, not illustrated. A 45-year-old adult male, authoritative and stern, male body proportions, deep-set eyes, intense and piercing gaze, well-groomed short black hair in a traditional Chinese topknot, wearing heavy dark silk official robes of the Daxia Dynasty with intricate gold and silver embroidery, high-ranking official, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, high detail, dignified presence, fixed outfit: 大夏朝高级官员服饰，材质为厚重的深色丝绸，带有代表权力的暗纹刺绣，佩戴象征身份的玉质或金属腰带, fixed visual tags: 威严, 铁面无私, 刑部大吏, 45岁男性, 电影质感, 古代官员, 威严感, cinematic live action, not illustrated, centered close-up head portrait, crop above chest, no hands, no props, exactly one face only
